Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('case:', d['case']['title_en']\); print\('status:', d['case']['status']\); print\('sections:', len\(d['case']['sections']\)\); print\('memories:', len\(d['memories']\)\); print\('memory ids:', [m['id'] for m in d['memories']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); linked=[m for m in d['memories'] if m.get\('case_id'\)]; print\('total memories:', len\(d['memories']\)\); print\('linked to case:', len\(linked\)\); [print\(' -', m['id'], m['case_id']\) for m in linked]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); linked=[m for m in d['memories'] if m.get\('case_id'\)]; print\('total:', len\(d['memories']\)\); print\('linked:', len\(linked\)\); [print\(' -', m['id'], m['case_id']\) for m in linked[:5]]; print\('sample keys:', list\(d['memories'][0].keys\(\)\) if d['memories'] else 'no memories'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['memories'][0]; print\('id:', m['id']\); print\('topics:', json.dumps\(m.get\('topics', 'MISSING'\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=next\(x for x in d['memories'] if x['id']=='m01'\); print\('id:', m['id']\); print\('case_id:', m['case_id']\); print\('topics:', json.dumps\([t['slug'] for t in m['topics']]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['case']; print\('title_en:', c['title_en'][:50]\); print\('topics:', [t['slug'] for t in c['topics']]\); print\('memories:', [m['id'] for m in d['memories']]\)")
